title: Preparing for HTB CPTS Exam
description: Currently preparing for the Hack The Box Certified Penetration Testing Specialist (CPTS) exam to enhance penetration testing skills, through solving practical offensive security labs.

title: Finished "AI Evasion - Sparsity Attacks" Course by Hack The Box Academy
description: Completed the "AI Evasion - Sparsity Attacks" course by Hack The Box Academy, which involved exploring sparsity-based evasion methods and evaluating their effectiveness against neural network models.

title: Finished "AI Evasion - First-Order Attacks" Course by Hack The Box Academy
description: Completed the "AI Evasion - First-Order Attacks" course by Hack The Box Academy, which involved exploring first-order evasion methods, implementing attacks like FGSM and DeepFool, and evaluating neural network robustness against adversarial vulnerabilities.
